name: Echo
description: Concentric squares nested to the center — every ring picks its own color, twist and corner roundness, so each redraw resettles the whole stack.

code.style: --rule: ( @place-cell: center; @size: calc(104% - (@i - 1) * 100% / @I); background: @pd(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); border-radius: @rand(2%, 40%); transform: rotate(@rand(-12deg, 12deg)); transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: 1x${rings}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
